Sample Fixture Doc

A committed fixture used by the offline UI test suite. It is served by the local server so the tests run against the working-tree overlay, not a live deploy.

Section One

Some prose so the article column has real height for layout tests.

Section Two

A second section with its own heading so reconcile fingerprinting has distinct nearest-heading values to key on.

KeyValue
alpha1
beta2

Section Three

function demo() {
  return "a commentable code block";
}
A commentable blockquote for good measure.
